User.title: User Profile
User.description: Contains user registration, dashboard metrics, and membership tier details.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

country.description: User country of origin or target residence.

cvScore.description: Calculated score of the user's career portfolio (0-100).

CV.title: Resume Data
CV.description: Structured curriculum vitae details built using the interactive editor and AI templates.

title.description: Target job title matching the CV focus.

experience.description: Form-aligned or AI-synthesized career roles and responsibilities.

Application.title: Job Application
Application.description: Records representing a job applied to by the candidate.

jobId.description: Unique key identifier of the job post.

jobTitle.description: Aspirational title of the targeted vacancy.

coverLetter.description: Cover letter text custom generated by the AI model.

status.description: Current application vetting pipeline status (Applied, Interview, Offer, Rejected).

statusColor.description: Color code representing current pipeline index.

dateApplied.description: Global server runtime timestamp of submission.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles with security limited globally to self-ownership.

/cvs/{userId}.description: Curriculum vitae records bound strictly to owner accounts.

/applications/{applicationId}.description: Application logs allowing user querying and index lists.
